other_findings.finding: IL1Bhi monocytes represent the peripheral tissue-adapted monocyte state, enriched in non-bone-marrow organs
CCR2hi monocytes in peripheral organs upregulate IL1B and TNF-alpha signalling genes compared to bone marrow CCR2hi monocytes
Monocyte maturation in peripheral tissues represents a conserved process of proliferation and differentiation

evidence_quotes.quote: Among CCR2 hi monocytes, we distinguished bone marrowand peripheral organ-specific subpopulations
evidence_quotes.context: Distinction between bone marrow and tissue CCR2hi monocytes

evidence_quotes.quote: Bone marrow CCR2 hi monocytes expressed proliferation genes, whereas peripheral organ CCR2 hi monocytes upregulated IL1B and other TNF-a signaling genes

Innate immune cells, such as macrophages and innate lymphoid cells (ILCs), were present from early gestation, whereas B cells and T cells emerged later, accompanying thymus, bone marrow and spleen formation from around 10 PCW
evidence_quotes.context: Temporal appearance of immune cells in prenatal skin
